_comment: Tier-2 for fenics stokes#: ufl.FiniteElement / VectorElement / MixedElement / TensorElement were REMOVED from UFL in 2024+; dolfinx 0.10 / ufl 2025.2 / basix 0.10 only ship basix.ufl.element(..., shape=(gdim,)) / mixed_element / blocked_element. The stokes generator used the removed forms — runs would fail with AttributeError on the first element construction. Catalog falsification #24, found via the new fenics_source_scanner.py introspection of all dolfinx/ufl/basix APIs that catalog generators name. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
